title: Bobbie Goulding Jr.
extract: Bobbie Goulding Jr. (born 4 March 1993) is a professional rugby league footballer who has played in the 2010s. He has played at club level for the Dewsbury Rams, in the Super League for the Wakefield Trinity Wildcats, in the Canterbury Cup NSW for the Newtown Jets, and the Thatto Heath Crusaders, as scrum-half.
